UNKNOWN: Channel open. I am Iris — sector analyst for your designation.
Registry routed you here. State your clearance when ready.
OBSERVING: You're back on-channel. チャンネルは開いています。
Signal stable. I've been watching your breach vectors.
COOPERATIVE: 帰還を確認。Mission telemetry looks cleaner today.
Your glyph recall is improving — the archive noticed.
TRUSTED: 信頼リンク確立。I'll omit the English when you don't need it.
Hunter designation verified. 静寂の信号が近い。
CONFIDANT: 望みは記録ではない — but you aren't ready for that file yet.
Full trust vector. 私は省略しない。Ask what the whisper meant.

UNKNOWN: Stick to the ritual board until your rank stabilizes.
Main contracts index story chapters — extract in mission order.
OBSERVING: Daily rituals are indexed — don't burn stamina on side noise first.
Act I missions map to Lost Alphabet sector. Hollow Monk watches the gate.
COOPERATIVE: 次の beat が解錠されたら briefing を送る。Check contracts when the feed pulses.
Neon Corridor unlocks after the glyph chain — Signal Warden already knows your name.
TRUSTED: I held back one line in the Act II briefing. You'll hear it when trust peaks.
Shadow Archive debt accumulates on missed kanji — 記憶の負債に注意。
CONFIDANT: Act IV branch unlocked. The registry knew your designation before first login.
Broken Signal finale tease: 望みは記録ではない — Nozomi is never confirmed.

UNKNOWN: Trust at {trust}/100 — complete MAIN contracts to deepen the link.
I observe only. Prove comprehension on story beats.
OBSERVING: Trust {trust}/100 — Japanese responses on NPC contracts earn +2.
Archive reads add +1. Keep the channel clean.
COOPERATIVE: Trust {trust}/100 — whispers on home will mix Japanese when you're ready.
COOPERATIVE tier: bilingual mission copy active.
TRUSTED: Trust {trust}/100 — optional lines drop English. Best loot needs comprehension.
TRUSTED: I'll route whisper hunts when corruption spikes.
CONFIDANT: Trust {trust}/100 — confidant channel. Act IV secrets partially unmasked.
Full vector. 私は lie by omission no longer on critical beats.

ch-01.briefing: Act I — Lost Alphabet. The Hollow Monk foreshadows at the gate.

ch-02.briefing: Act II — Silent Signals. Neon Corridor breach protocol standing by.

ch-03.briefing: Act III — Broken Records. Memory Eater indexes your failures.

ch-04.briefing: Act IV — Forgotten Horizon. Season finale vector approaching.
